Hi,
I want to resign following ports those I still have been a maintainer:
/usr/ports/deskutils/xcalendar
/usr/ports/devel/libpasori
/usr/ports/japanese/edyvalue
/usr/ports/japanese/suicavalue
/usr/ports/net/p5-Net-Wake

/usr/ports/sysutils/du2ps
/usr/ports/x11-fonts/bdfresize

FYI:
The current mail address (@jp.FreeBSD.org) is already unreachable.
Sorry for late submission.
